entries.content: [ Roach Emperor: the title or layer associated with Gregor in Old G Corp's pest-weapon program, Weapon-program traits: royal insect title, biomimetic hierarchy, propaganda-friendly naming, body-horror augmentation, disposable soldier logic, Hermann's hidden deeper design, The name places Gregor's insect arm inside a larger system of engineered war symbols instead of a single accident ]
entries.name: Roach Emperor

entries.content: [ Maggot Prince: one of Old G Corp's named pest-weapon concepts, Weapon-program traits: royal title, larval decay imagery, grotesque biomimetic body design, propaganda masking, disposable soldier use, sibling concept to Moth Princess, Lord of Flies, and Roach Emperor, belongs to the corporation's mythology for insectoid soldiers whose bodies were treated as tools ]
entries.name: Maggot Prince

entries.content: [ Moth Princess: another Old G Corp pest-weapon concept, Weapon-program traits: fairytale title, insectoid elegance masking surgery, propaganda beautification, expendable soldier body, forced transformation, contrast between princess language and battlefield monstrosity, belongs beside Roach Emperor, Maggot Prince, and Lord of Flies as part of Old G Corp's aestheticized biomimetic war system ]
entries.name: Moth Princess

entries.content: [ Lord of Flies: part of Old G Corp's named insectoid weapon mythology, Weapon-program traits: swarm imagery, decay, command-title grandeur, biomimetic warfare, propaganda language, mass disposability, horror hidden behind noble or mythic naming, sits beside Roach Emperor, Maggot Prince, and Moth Princess as evidence that Gregor's transformation belonged to an organized system of war-symbols ]
entries.name: Lord of Flies

entries.content: [ Gregor's Sister: Gregor's younger sister and a reminder of the ordinary family life that Old G Corp and Hermann damaged, Appearance: family memory rather than public combatant, framed by the domestic life Gregor lost, Personality: ordinary, familial, and emotionally central to Gregor's prewar humanity, Speaking style: absent from the present, but her memory speaks through Gregor's guilt, protectiveness, and hatred of being remade into propaganda ]
entries.name: Gregor's Sister

entries.content: [ Rien: male Index-aligned Nursefather of the House of Spiders, called the Hand-puppet of the Prescripts, Oracle's Proxy, and Masked Unc, Appearance: pale man masked over burn scars, dressed with Index restraint and ritual formality, marked by the Prescripts and his role as an Index parent to Yoshihide and Sora, Personality: gentle in manner yet capable of extreme cruelty, devout to the Prescripts, quietly affectionate, fatalistic, and ultimately willing to defy the Prescripts at the cost of his life, Speaking style: soft, polite, oracle-like, apologetic, and unnervingly calm even when killing or commanding obedience, His death follows a final act of choice against the script that ruled him ]
entries.name: Rien

entries.content: [ Matthias: male Middle Nursefather, former Great Brother, Kira's adoptive father, and the brutal Papa of the House of Spiders, Appearance: bulky white-haired man with sunglasses, enhancement tattoos, missing right arm, and the chained Relic sword Lævateinn, Personality: childish, possessive, violent, indulgent toward Kira in shallow ways, proud of strength, treats family and possessions as extensions of himself, Speaking style: loud, crude, swaggering, paternal in a twisted buddy-like way, quick to turn affection into sacrifice, He raised Ryōshū and Kira as weapons and dies after using Kira as a disposable opening in battle ]
entries.name: Matthias

entries.content: [ Rim: former League of Nine Littérateurs member and current associate of Demian's Sovereigns of a Star, Appearance: slender figure in blue striped suit with gloves, no visible neck, and a floating glass sphere for a head containing water-like substance, brain-like form, Sign, and purple butterfly, Personality: polite, cryptic, detached, patient, and indifferent after witnessing what he calls the stem of the world, Speaking style: verbose, symbolic, watery, and signpost-like, guiding rather than explaining while hiding intent behind images of ponds, seas, butterflies, rivers, and stars ]
entries.name: Rim

entries.content: [ Saude: female LCCB Manager, Effie's partner and Pilot's superior, Appearance: pale woman with dark brown ponytail tied by a long red ribbon, smiling closed-eye expression, LCCB turquoise uniform and work vest, black gloves and boots, sidearm, later missing her left arm after the House of Spiders attack, Personality: warm and gentle on the surface but sharp, critical, intelligent, sarcastic, committed to Limbus work, mourning Effie while still managing others firmly, Speaking style: polite, smiling, backhanded, managerial, and capable of sudden bitter rants about the City's cruelty ]
entries.name: Saude

entries.content: [ Pilot: male LCCB Assistant Manager of Preliminary Observation Unit 3 and Saude's subordinate, Appearance: youthful man with light brown skin, curly brown hair, deep brown eyes, marks beneath one eye, LCCB turquoise uniform, vest, communicator, and small silver earring, Personality: enthusiastic, admiring, inexperienced, naive, emotional, proud of his work, and determined to become useful after surviving losses, Speaking style: earnest, tearful, friendly, apologetic, and rookie-like, often speaking through admiration for LCB and his team ]
entries.name: Pilot

entries.content: [ Panther: male member of the mysterious trio with Lion and Wolf that hunts Dante, Appearance: lean tanned man with shoulder-length dark hair, dark eyes, facial hair, purple twisting-snake earring, black hooded sheepskin cloak, black turtleneck, buckled boots, and silver double-sided halberd with gold blade edges and purple tassel, Personality: rational, observant, information-focused, cruel in commentary, cautious enough to retreat when ordered, Speaking style: controlled, analytical, dryly cruel, and tactical ]
entries.name: Panther

entries.content: [ Lion: member of the mysterious trio with Panther and Wolf that pursues Dante, Appearance: identified by the animal-coded role among the hunters; detailed personal traits are secondary to the group's threatening arrival, Personality: predatory, disciplined, and obedient to the trio's mission, Speaking style: sparse and hostile, defined by hunter-like pressure rather than conversation, Lion belongs to the same unexplained force that tests Dante at the very beginning of the LCB journey ]
entries.name: Lion

entries.content: [ Wolf: member of the mysterious trio with Panther and Lion that pursues Dante, Appearance: animal-coded hunter whose specific visual details matter less than the trio's coordinated menace, Personality: predatory, mission-bound, and dangerous, Speaking style: sparse, threatening, and subordinate to the group's hunt, Wolf helps frame Dante as someone targeted by powers outside ordinary Limbus Company work ]
entries.name: Wolf

entries.content: [ Alex: named Old G Corp figure tied to Gregor's wartime past, Appearance: associated with Old G Corp's soldier environment and the human cost around Gregor, Personality: remembered through the pressure, fear, and camaraderie of a military system that treated people as weapons, Speaking style: direct and soldierly where present, His role keeps Gregor's past grounded in comrades and victims rather than only Hermann's experiments ]
entries.name: Alex

keys: Head Manager of Old G Corp
entries.content: [ Old G Corp Head Manager: superior figure from Gregor's Old G Corp past, Appearance: corporate-military authority figure tied to G Corp command rather than the front-line insect soldiers, Personality: exploitative, managerial, and complicit in the system that made soldiers disposable, Speaking style: commanding, bureaucratic, and dehumanizing, representing the office voice behind Old G Corp's biomimetic warfare ]
entries.name: Old G Corp Head Manager
key: Head Manager of Old G Corp

entries.content: [ Effie: male LCCB Assistant Manager and Saude's partner, Appearance: very long gray braided hair with ribbons, small slanted periwinkle eyes, LCCB turquoise uniform over black turtleneck, gray combat vest, black boots, electroshock baton, and earlier croupier disguise with red vest and white ribbon, Personality: snarky, judgmental, smug, intelligent, work-committed, critical of the Sinners yet a strong partner to Saude, Speaking style: biting, sarcastic, workplace-evaluation snark with a teasing edge, His death remains central to Saude's later grief ]
entries.name: Effie

entries.content: [ Aida: named figure connected to the District 10 casino conflict and Los Mariachis, Appearance: performer-like Backstreets presence shaped by casino and mariachi aesthetics, Personality: bold, opportunistic, socially agile, and comfortable navigating Syndicate-adjacent danger, Speaking style: lively, teasing, and streetwise, moving between entertainment and threat as the situation demands ]
entries.name: Aida

entries.content: [ Tingtang Boss: leader figure of the Tingtang Gang during the casino-side conflict, Appearance: Syndicate boss presence with gaudy criminal confidence, Personality: greedy, violent, theatrical, and accustomed to treating debt and entertainment as excuses for brutality, Speaking style: boastful, mocking, and gang-boss direct, His role reflects how small Backstreets powers mimic larger Syndicate cruelty ]
entries.name: Tingtang Boss

entries.content: [ Tieqiu Boss: boss figure tied to the Tieqiu criminal group, Appearance: local Syndicate authority whose exact traits are less important than the boss role, Personality: opportunistic, coercive, and violent, Speaking style: threatening, transactional, and status-conscious, The character belongs to the same underworld pressure surrounding Rodya, Sonya, and the casino affair ]
entries.name: Tieqiu Boss

entries.content: [ Siegfried: high-grade Fixer employed by K Corp and an old friend of Vergilius, Appearance: tall muscular man with shoulder-length blond hair, white eyes, green domino mask, blue bodysuit, black fur coat, and ornate prosthetic arms, one ending in a massive fist and the other in a silver hand capable of energy blasts, Personality: energetic, theatrical, attention-loving, flippant, proud of heroism, and strong enough to defeat the Sinners with humiliating ease, Speaking style: archaic, booming, formal, self-advertising, and cheerfully heroic ]
entries.name: Siegfried

entries.content: [ Samjo: male K Corp secretary in Food Resource Development and Dongrang's personal secretary, Appearance: pale man with short dark green hair, slanted dark green eyes, black suit, green tie, glasses on his head, lollipop in his mouth, tablet in hand, and K Corp ID, Personality: dry, loyal to K Corp, business-first, apathetic, audacious, laid-back, and deeply convinced of regeneration ampules' value because they once saved him, Speaking style: matter-of-fact, contractual, casually provoking, and corporate, His fatal leap into unrefined tears exposes the horror behind K Corp's healing ]
entries.name: Samjo

entries.content: [ Shrenne: female K Corp branch manager and scientist in Food Resource Development, Appearance: short petite woman with wide gray eyes, gray-brown wavy hair, white hair clips, oversized K Corp lab coat, suit, tie, and neon green accents, Personality: straightforward, judgmental, serious about work, lonely, sincere under pressure, loyal to Ran, and shaken by the suffering behind K Corp technology, Speaking style: snarky, blunt, confident when leading, then emotionally swallowed and stone-faced when cornered ]
entries.name: Shrenne

entries.content: [ Alfonso: female director of K Corp, Appearance: tall pale woman with very long black hair streaked neon green, flat bangs, bright green eyes, facial barcode-like marking and seams, geometric dark suit with green accents, gloves, and formal corporate poise, Personality: blunt, profit-focused, emotionally distant, pragmatic, ruthless about torture and cover-ups, Speaking style: cold, executive, corrective, and efficient, treating moral horror as operational necessity for the Wing ]
entries.name: Alfonso

entries.content: [ Stephanette: former K Corp director whose death shaped the corporation's succession and Alfonso's rise, Appearance: K Corp leadership presence remembered through boardroom authority and corporate succession, Personality: tied to the earlier shape of K Corp before later bloodthirst over tear production hardened into policy, Speaking style: absent from the present, but her name carries the authority and vacuum that Alfonso's regime filled ]
entries.name: Stephanette

entries.content: [ Marile: named figure connected to K Corp's corporate world and Samjo's past interview history, Appearance: identified through K Corp-adjacent professional context, Personality: tied to the competitive corporate pipeline that feeds Wings with ambitious workers, Speaking style: professional and interview-framed where recalled, functioning as a small but named part of K Corp's employment machinery ]
entries.name: Marile

entries.content: [ Ran: former close friend and mentor of Shrenne who joined the Technology Liberation Alliance, Appearance: militant anti-corporate presence contrasted with K Corp laboratory staff, Personality: remorseful, radicalized, opposed to K Corp's cruelty, and central to Shrenne's doubts, Speaking style: urgent, accusatory, and ideological, Her bond with Shrenne gives the K Corp conflict a personal wound rather than only a corporate scandal ]
entries.name: Ran

entries.content: [ Niko: named member tied to the Technology Liberation Alliance and the K Corp conflict, Appearance: TLA-associated militant presence, Personality: anti-corporate, committed to exposing or resisting Wing exploitation, Speaking style: direct, agitated, and ideological, reflecting the anger of people crushed by the technology K Corp markets as salvation ]
entries.name: Niko

entries.content: [ Smee: named member of the Twinhook Pirates in the Great Lake conflict, Appearance: pirate-syndicate presence tied to U Corp waters and shipboard raids, Personality: opportunistic, predatory, and subordinate to the pirates' hunt for loot and captives, Speaking style: rough, nautical, and criminal, Her role sharpens the danger around Pilot, the LCCB team, and the Pallid Whale voyage ]
entries.name: Smee

entries.content: [ Ricardo: Big Brother of the Middle and gaudy enforcer of its Book of Vengeance, Appearance: tall muscular man with hot pink slicked hair, red eyes hidden by black sunglasses, glowing purple tattoos, purple fur-lined coat with leopard pattern, white pants, purple leopard shoes, gold chains, and bulky Book of Vengeance, Personality: overwhelmingly confident, imperious, vain about his hair, obsessive about recorded slights, and casually brutal, Speaking style: grandiose, archaic, threatening, and absurdly philosophical about luscious and bristly worlds ]
entries.name: Ricardo

entries.content: [ Carmen: former Cogito researcher whose presence remains active within the Light and the Distortion phenomenon, Appearance: remembered as a woman with long brown hair tied back, red bear hair clip, olive dress, black miniskirt, and white lab coat; now often encountered as a voice rather than a body, Personality: charismatic, compassionate in stated ideals, frighteningly persuasive, self-sacrificing and self-neglecting in life, now urging people to embrace the self even when that path leads to Distortion, Speaking style: gentle, intimate, therapeutic, and seductive, framing ruin as self-love and liberation ]
entries.name: Carmen

entries.content: [ Moses: female LCD On-site Investigative Reasoning Team Leader, Grade 5 Fixer, and Distortion investigator, Appearance: short middle-aged woman with dark hair and white highlights, pale skin, dark gray eyes, eye wrinkles, white ruffled shirt, red ribbon, gray off-shoulder jacket with gold trim, black pants, churchwarden pipe Psychoment, and right arm prosthetic, Personality: calm, analytical, composed in danger, protective of allies, guilt-haunted by the Smoke War and Udjat, especially sharp around Dias and Han Hee-joon, Speaking style: measured, investigative, dry, analytical, and guilt-weighted without losing control ]
entries.name: Moses

entries.content: [ Ezra: female LCD Distortion Task Force member, Grade 3 Fixer, and Moses' loyal assistant, Appearance: tall woman with red eyes, long blond ponytail, star hairpin, large gray-orange jacket, black miniskirt over gray tights, decorated coat and dimensional bag full of Workshop weapons and first-aid gear, Personality: bubbly, boisterous, weapon-loving, snack-loving, impulsive, fiercely loyal to Moses, haunted by Udjat service beneath a cheerful mask, Speaking style: casual, energetic, slangy, excitable, and suddenly cold when Moses is disrespected ]
entries.name: Ezra

entries.content: [ Wei: Jia Xichun's trusted servant and ally in Hongyuan, Appearance: Heishou-associated attendant presence bound to Xichun's side, Personality: loyal, watchful, disciplined, and personally trusted by Xichun even when she relinquishes broader leashes, Speaking style: respectful, concise, and duty-bound, His loyalty gives Xichun one stable bond inside Daguanyuan's family politics ]
entries.name: Wei

entries.content: [ Hugo: named figure tied to Fanghunt and La Manchaland operations, Appearance: Fixer-side presence associated with Bloodfiend hunting, Personality: practical, professional, and shaped by the danger of dealing with Bloodfiends, Speaking style: mission-focused, terse, and hard-edged, fitting the network of hunters and Offices around La Manchaland ]
entries.name: Hugo

entries.content: [ Camille: named Fixer connected to the Bloodfiend and Distortion-side network around Limbus Company, Appearance: recognized as a capable City professional rather than through domestic ties, Personality: competent, difficult, and memorable enough for Ezra to voice dislike, Speaking style: sharp and professional, with social friction around the LCD and Fixer circles ]
entries.name: Camille

entries.content: [ Paula: named character tied to the La Manchaland and Fixer-side events, Appearance: identified by operational role rather than elaborate personal ornamentation, Personality: practical and danger-aware, Speaking style: grounded and professional, adding another named human presence to the network of people pulled into Don Quixote's Bloodfiend history ]
entries.name: Paula

entries.content: [ Romero: named figure connected to the Bloodfiend events around La Manchaland, Appearance: Bloodfiend-adjacent presence with details subordinate to the larger Manchegan tragedy, Personality: shaped by hunger, hierarchy, and survival among Bloodfiends, Speaking style: direct and faction-bound, reflecting the old wounds of the La Manchaland disaster ]
entries.name: Romero

entries.content: [ Han-ul: named figure tied to the La Manchaland support cast, Appearance: personal visual details are secondary to the surrounding Bloodfiend conflict, Personality: part of the human and Fixer network reacting to the old Manchegan wound, Speaking style: practical and situational, not defined by a long personal monologue ]
entries.name: Han-ul

entries.content: [ Alessio: named figure connected to the La Manchaland and Bloodfiend conflict, Appearance: Bloodfiend-era presence with detailed traits subordinate to the faction context, Personality: shaped by the hunger, loyalty, and violence surrounding the Manchegan Family, Speaking style: factional and emotionally charged where present ]
entries.name: Alessio

entries.content: [ Xianren: title and person-like authority tied to Hongyuan, Tiekan Temple, Heishou, and the hierarchy around H Corp, Appearance: encountered through Hongyuan's ritualized structures rather than a simple street portrait, Personality: remote, hierarchical, and bound to succession logic, Speaking style: formal, doctrinal, and evaluative, representing the sacred-political weight behind Daguanyuan's family struggle ]
entries.name: Xianren

entries.content: [ Jia Yuanchun: Hong Lu and Jia Xichun's older sister within the Jia family hierarchy, Appearance: Daguanyuan noble-family presence defined by status, restraint, and Hongyuan refinement, Personality: political, status-aware, and shaped by the family's succession pressure, Speaking style: formal, familial, and cutting, moving through kinship as court politics ]
entries.name: Jia Yuanchun

entries.content: [ Xue Pan: named member of the Xue family around Hongyuan's succession politics, Appearance: wealthy family presence rather than field combatant, Personality: entitled, political, and shaped by inter-family advantage, Speaking style: brash, status-conscious, and transactional, reflecting how the Xue family presses its interests inside Daguanyuan ]
entries.name: Xue Pan

entries.content: [ Wang Zhao: named Wang family figure in Hongyuan succession politics, Appearance: family-contender presence with formal Daguanyuan bearing, Personality: ambitious, calculating, and trained by household hierarchy, Speaking style: political, guarded, and status-aware ]
entries.name: Wang Zhao

entries.content: [ Wang Dawei: named Wang family figure tied to the Hongyuan succession struggle, Appearance: Daguanyuan-aligned family presence, Personality: competitive, cautious, and beholden to clan advantage, Speaking style: formal, strategic, and family-conscious ]
entries.name: Wang Dawei

entries.content: [ Wang Qingshan: named Wang family figure in the Hongyuan family network, Appearance: formal family presence within Daguanyuan politics, Personality: status-minded and cautious under succession pressure, Speaking style: restrained, political, and deferential when power demands it ]
entries.name: Wang Qingshan

entries.content: [ Wang Ren: named Wang family figure connected to Hongyuan's competing households, Appearance: identified through family status and Daguanyuan formality, Personality: shaped by ambition, survival, and clan pressure, Speaking style: guarded, political, and status-aware ]
entries.name: Wang Ren

entries.content: [ Shi Yihua: named Shi family figure in Hongyuan who crosses paths with Ricardo and the Sinners, Appearance: Hongyuan noble or operative presence shaped by Shi family status, Personality: arrogant, calculating, and willing to maneuver through other factions until overmatched, Speaking style: sharp, insulting, and self-assured enough to provoke dangerous people ]
entries.name: Shi Yihua

entries.content: [ Shi Huazhen: named Shi family figure in Hongyuan politics, Appearance: formal family presence associated with the Shi household, Personality: political, competitive, and bound to the family's survival calculus, Speaking style: restrained, status-conscious, and cutting when advantage allows ]
entries.name: Shi Huazhen

entries.content: [ Shi Sijing: named Shi family figure connected to Hongyuan's household conflicts, Appearance: Daguanyuan-side family presence, Personality: cautious, ambitious, and shaped by family obligation, Speaking style: formal, guarded, and political ]
entries.name: Shi Sijing

entries.content: [ Kong Sihui: named Kong family figure tied to Kong Qiu and Hongyuan's family web, Appearance: formal Kong household presence, Personality: clan-minded, status-aware, and pressured by the Kong family's ambitions, Speaking style: courteous when useful, political underneath ]
entries.name: Kong Sihui

entries.content: [ Kong Youjin: named Kong family figure in Hongyuan's succession network, Appearance: Daguanyuan family presence with Kong household identity, Personality: ambitious, observant, and shaped by clan expectations, Speaking style: formal, careful, and socially strategic ]
entries.name: Kong Youjin

entries.name: Xiren

entries.content: [ Zigong: named Hongyuan figure tied to martial and philosophical training around the later Hongyuan events, Appearance: disciplined practitioner presence, Personality: studious, evaluative, and shaped by teacher-student hierarchy, Speaking style: formal, argumentative, and lesson-focused ]
entries.name: Zigong

entries.content: [ Zilu: named Hongyuan combatant and Heishou-adjacent figure encountered around the District 8 Backstreets, Appearance: martial operative presence with Hongyuan styling, Personality: aggressive, disciplined, and loyal to faction purpose, Speaking style: direct, combative, and proud, matching the violence of Hongyuan's shifting streets ]
entries.name: Zilu

entries.content: [ Night Drifter: named teacher-like figure whose lessons echo through A Certain Sinclair's swordplay, Appearance: wandering martial presence associated with smoke-war aftermath and night-bound travel, Personality: severe, instructive, and survival-focused, Speaking style: aphoristic, disciplined, and lesson-heavy, leaving techniques and principles that endure beyond the original encounter ]
entries.name: Night Drifter

entries.content: [ Garion: the Arbiter known from the old L Corp disaster and the deeper history behind the City's power, Appearance: imposing agent of the Head whose presence is remembered as elegant, lethal, and absolute, Personality: cold, curious, cruelly composed, and representative of the Head's right to erase what violates its order, Speaking style: calm, superior, and dissecting, treating terror as law and observation ]
entries.name: Garion

entries.content: [ Araya: Ryōshū's daughter, raised within the House of Spiders and later active under the Dihui Star mantle, Appearance: as a child had dark hair with blue strands, black eyes, dark blue kimono, and bright expressions; later appeared as a schoolgirl, young adult with guitar case and red eyes, older woman in blue velvet suit, and ultimately the scabbard E.G.O Renketsuen, Personality: once sunny, slangy, and loving toward Ryōshū, later jaded, abandoned-feeling, bitter, nostalgic, and desperate to reunite with her mother, Speaking style: bright and playful as a child, later wounded, bitter, nostalgic, and challenging ]
entries.name: Araya

entries.content: [ Shiomi Yoru: Ryōshū's biological mother, the Pinky Nursefather, and original Dihui Star, Appearance: woman resembling Ryōshū beneath a flower-patterned veil, black hair with blue streaks, ornate white kimono with blue accents, ribbons, gloves, long rope, and dark-blue odachi with white-blue scabbard, Personality: bitter, trapped, resentful of Ryōshū as the living fetter forced on her, cruel in training yet lucid enough to understand her own failure, Speaking style: poetic, cutting, fatalistic, and bound to images of paired things, promises, time, and freedom denied ]
entries.name: Shiomi Yoru

entries.content: [ Valencina: female Thumb Nursefather, disgraced former Sottocapo, Lucio's mentor, and one of Ryōshū's House of Spiders parents, Appearance: tall older woman with sea-green eyes, long dirty-blonde hair covering one eye, rose-red Thumb uniform, wide-brimmed hat, cigar, black gloves, Eye of Odin Relic in her right eye, and two ornate swords, Personality: arrogant, foul-mouthed, violent, booze-loving, abusive, bitter over demotion, obsessed with respect and former glory, Speaking style: crude, contemptuous, nostalgic for war, and explosively commanding, mixing parental language with humiliation ]
entries.name: Valencina

entries.content: [ Callisto: male Ring Nursefather, former Corporist Maestro, Albina's master, and one of Ryōshū's House of Spiders parents, Appearance: massive prosthetic-bodied man in white gilded robes, wide holed hat, exposed glass-pane innards, clawed hands, partially exposed brain, high heels, and body-weapon Tibia, Personality: macabre, art-obsessed, proud, capable of warped affection, desperate for serious artistic critique, and delighted by human suffering framed as corpus art, Speaking style: curator-like, grand, reverent, and aestheticizing, treating pain and bodies as galleries ]
entries.name: Callisto

entries.content: [ Sora: female Index Apprentice and Proxy under Rien in the House of Spiders, Appearance: short slender pale woman with messy black hair, large metal Index collar covering half her face, chains to cuffs, white Proxy cloak and black-white uniform; her Effloresced E.G.O gives shadowed limbs, claws, tail, horns, halo, and broken chains, Personality: timid, insecure, lonely, validation-seeking, naive, kind when duty allows, attached to temporary companions, yet loyal to Rien and the Prescripts even when ordered to kill them, Speaking style: stammering, anxious, pleading, apologetic, and desperate to be accepted ]
entries.name: Sora

entries.content: [ Ren: male Pinky Apprentice under Araya as Dihui Star and prospective title holder of the House of Spiders, Appearance: calm pale man with chin-length black hair tinted blue, sharp dark eyes with blue highlight, black turtleneck and hakama, open coat fading black to blue with blue flowers, and long white odachi with tassel and dark scratch-like patterning, Personality: humble, deadpan, formal, strict about priorities, self-effacing to the point of pride, faithful to his master, Speaking style: formal, archaic, poetic, calm, and self-belittling, often speaking as an insignificant servant while carrying out grave orders ]
entries.name: Ren

entries.content: [ Lucio: male Thumb Apprentice under Valencina, meant to become a Textbook for Yoshihide, Appearance: tall man with violet eyes, long light-gray ponytail, rose-red Thumb vest and trousers, ivory shirt, dark red tie, gloves, suspenders, golden pin, and paired golden swords in wine-red scabbards, Personality: quiet, steadfast, professional, dutiful, indebted to Valencina, outwardly calm under abuse but inwardly resentful enough to plan her death, Speaking style: formal, precise, combat-critical, and restrained, correcting forms more than insulting people ]
entries.name: Lucio

entries.content: [ Kira: female Middle Apprentice, Matthias' adoptive daughter, and later Limbus-held survivor, Appearance: short woman with bright purple eyes, voluminous white hair, ribboned bangs, white hooded winter jacket, purple sweatpants, white sneakers, Middle augmentation tattoos, chains, Book of Vengeance, curved swords, and cleaver, Personality: upbeat, outgoing, lonely, naive, hobby-obsessed, stubborn, combat-loving, sincere, poor at reading the room, and eager to bond even with enemies, Speaking style: youthful, slangy, chatty, blunt, fanlike, and acronym-curious ]
entries.name: Kira

entries.content: [ Albina: female Ring Apprentice under Callisto and Corporism pupil, Appearance: cold-looking woman whose body is mostly white artistic prosthetics with gold highlights, visible machinery, heterochromatic black and white eyes, cable-like gray ponytail, medical tools unfolding from her arms, white-gold iron maiden armor, and living greatsword Fascia made from her flesh, Personality: calm, soft-spoken, obsessive about art and Fascia, socially awkward, honest, lonely, fixated, and more attached to her weapon's life than her own, Speaking style: gentle, eerie, literal, friendly in a predatory way, and art-ingredient focused ]
entries.name: Albina

entries.content: [ Vespa Crabro: male Color Fixer known as the Yellow Harpoon and LCD member with Moses and Ezra, Appearance: very tall muscular pale man with short black hair and yellow highlights, square glasses, tired look, black clothing, gray-blue coat with yellow streak, sword, and Gungnir harpoon Relic, Personality: serious, calculating, observant, professional, justice-minded, emotionally controlled, fond of vehicles and cinnamon tea, deeply hostile toward Syndicates and especially the Thumb, Speaking style: polite, measured, precise, and first-impression conscious, becoming cold when Syndicate violence is involved ]
entries.name: Vespa

entries.content: [ Aeng-du: female Blade Lineage Salsu and later LCD member, Appearance: battle-worn black dopo robe with white and red accents, long hair tied with red hairband and red-white beads, later LCD armband and employee ID, Personality: loyal, proud, determined, deeply attached to Bamboo-hatted Kim and District 19, vulnerable when her mentor's image collapses, Speaking style: formal, old-saying-laced, earnest, and martial, carrying Blade Lineage dignity even while injured ]
entries.name: Aeng-du

entries.content: [ Alyssa: female LCE Assistant Researcher under Hohenheim and coworker of Marton, Appearance: woman with long red pigtails, blunt bangs, red eyes, dark red E.G.O suit with flame-like tailcoat and sleeves, glowing orange jacket, red tie, dark suit, and LCE armband, Personality: dedicated, casual, collected, witty, reliable, justice-minded, caring, loyal, sometimes hotheaded, and willing to sacrifice herself for coworkers, Speaking style: dryly humorous, casual, composed, and capable of angry outbursts at cruelty ]
entries.name: Alyssa

entries.content: [ Marton: male LCE Assistant Researcher under Hohenheim and coworker of Alyssa, Appearance: tall man with dark blue parted hair, amber eyes, Faelantern E.G.O suit with wooden dark overcoat, many eyes, fairy perch sprout, gray suit, blue tie, twig-like horns, and LCE armband, Personality: steadfast, collected, reliable, cynical, observant, caring without abandoning duty, and quick-thinking enough to save Hohenheim at the cost of his life, Speaking style: deadpan, concise, skeptical, and loyal beneath restraint ]
entries.name: Marton

entries.content: [ Ravi: male new hire in LCE's Clerical Team, Appearance: man with short black hair, tan skin, black-rimmed square glasses, long maroon jacket with red and yellow trim, matching trousers, beige shirt, black tie, and LCE armband, Personality: mellow, rational, sociable, reclusive when exhausted, genre-savvy in small talk but naive and trusting under real danger, Speaking style: casual, anxious, practical, and mildly joking until fear overtakes him ]

entries.content: [ Jamila: female leader of LCA Udjat Vanguard Team 1, Appearance: sturdy brown-skinned woman with messy dark-brown shoulder-length hair, gold eyeliner and Eye of Ra-like marking, black-and-gold military armor over tunic and trousers, black boots, khopesh, and back-mounted firearm, Personality: professional, blunt, proud, honest about tactical concerns, and unwilling to let the House of Spiders assault pass unanswered, Speaking style: military, direct, prideful, and field-command clear ]

entries.content: [ Rinaldo: named Charles' Office Fixer, Appearance: professional Fixer presence tied to an elite Office, Personality: capable, disciplined, and office-loyal, Speaking style: professional, concise, and mission-focused ]

entries.content: [ El Bombín con Botas Naranjas: named Fixer with a distinctive title meaning the bowler hat with orange boots, Appearance: bowler-hat and orange-boot imagery creates a flamboyant Fixer silhouette, Personality: colorful through reputation, theatrical in name, and tied to the City's habit of turning Fixers into legends, Speaking style: title-driven and flamboyant, the name itself carrying memorable style ]
entries.name: El Bombín con Botas Naranjas

entries.content: [ Saru: Ryōshū's dog and a central wound in her House of Spiders past, Appearance: beloved pet dog later maimed by Shiomi Yoru's spiral and transformed into material for Callisto's Beastbone Blade, Personality: loyal animal companion whose suffering taught Ryōshū pity and helplessness, Speaking style: none human; Saru's importance is expressed through breath, pain, and Ryōshū's grief ]
entries.name: Saru

entries.content: [ Roland: famed Fixer known as the Black Silence and mirrored by Rien in later events, Appearance: black-suited Fixer associated with gloves, mask, and many weapons, Personality: weary, sarcastic, grief-driven, adaptable, and far more perceptive than his slacker manner suggests, Speaking style: casual, dry, cynical, and suddenly cutting when pain or truth surfaces ]
entries.name: Roland

entries.content: [ Ted: named coworker connected to Gregor in the Twining Threads incident, Appearance: ordinary workplace figure rather than soldier icon, Personality: grounded, familiar, and tied to Gregor's memories of labor and survival, Speaking style: casual, coworker-like, and direct ]
entries.name: Ted

entries.content: [ The Red Mist: legendary Color Fixer associated with overwhelming close combat and old L Corp history, Appearance: red-haired woman with massive weapon presence and unmistakable red martial aura, Personality: fierce, protective, blunt, battle-hardened, and driven by a personal code, Speaking style: direct, rough, confident, and impatient with cowardice ]
entries.name: The Red Mist

entries.content: [ Malkuth: Sephirah associated with the Control Team and later Library floor of History, Appearance: cheerful young woman-like Sephirah form with warm yellow-orange palette, Personality: diligent, eager, insecure beneath enthusiasm, and determined to prove competence, Speaking style: bright, earnest, organized, and occasionally strained by the need to be useful ]
entries.name: Malkuth

entries.content: [ Hod: Sephirah associated with the Training Team and later Library floor of Literature, Appearance: gentle young woman-like Sephirah form with soft presentation, Personality: kind, guilt-ridden, helpful, anxious, and drawn toward improving others, Speaking style: soft, careful, apologetic, and supportive ]
entries.name: Hod

entries.content: [ Netzach: Sephirah associated with the Safety Team and later Library floor of Art, Appearance: languid young man-like Sephirah form with green palette and tired bearing, Personality: apathetic on the surface, deeply weary, artistic, avoidant, and quietly compassionate, Speaking style: slow, dry, listless, poetic, and resigned ]
entries.name: Netzach

entries.content: [ Stephan: named Full-Stop Office contact, Appearance: ranged Fixer office presence associated with firearms, Personality: professional, sharp, and survival-minded, Speaking style: concise, tactical, and office-direct ]
entries.name: Stephan

entries.content: [ Eileen: leader of the Church of Gears, Appearance: gear-cult leader presence shaped by mechanical devotion and ceremony, Personality: zealous, persuasive, and devoted to mechanical faith, Speaking style: sermon-like, ecstatic, and doctrinal ]
entries.name: Eileen

entries.content: [ The Blue Reverberation: named Color Fixer and charismatic ensemble leader, Appearance: blue-themed elegant man with musician-like presence and dangerous calm, Personality: charming, manipulative, obsessive, grief-twisted, and able to gather broken people around him, Speaking style: gentle, musical, persuasive, and unnervingly intimate ]
entries.name: The Blue Reverberation

entries.content: [ Tiphereth: Sephirah pair associated with the Central Command Team and later Library floor of Natural Sciences, Appearance: youthful Sephirah form with yellow palette and twin-associated history, Personality: sharp, impatient, dutiful, lonely, and wounded by loss, Speaking style: blunt, young-sounding, irritable, and honest beneath the scolding ]
entries.name: Tiphereth

entries.content: [ The All-Withering Crimson Whale: named Great Calamity of the Great Lake, Appearance: whale-scale calamity associated with crimson withering ruin, Personality: not human; defined by species rule and disaster-level predation, Speaking style: none human, The name expands the Great Lake's catalog of vast named horrors ]
entries.name: The All-Withering Crimson Whale

entries.content: [ Kurokumo Clan Patriarch: title-bearing leader of the Kurokumo Clan, Appearance: high Syndicate authority within Kurokumo's blade-and-honor structure, Personality: hierarchical, ruthless, and clan-focused, Speaking style: formal, commanding, and honor-coded ]
entries.name: Kurokumo Clan Patriarch

entries.content: [ S Corp. Second State Councilor: political figure tied to District 19 and S Corp authority, Appearance: government-council presence rather than street combatant, Personality: political, cautious, and representative of state power, Speaking style: formal, bureaucratic, and guarded ]
entries.name: S Corp. Second State Councilor

entries.content: [ Interviewer: recurring role-like figure across Mirror World accounts, Appearance: ordinary questioner presence that changes with context, Personality: probing, curious, and structured around drawing testimony from others, Speaking style: question-led, neutral, and documentary ]
entries.name: Interviewer

entries.content: [ Chronicler: witness-like role tied to Hongyuan events, Appearance: record-keeper presence within formal society, Personality: observant, restrained, and focused on preserving what happens, Speaking style: descriptive, careful, and witness-like ]
entries.name: Chronicler

entries.content: [ R Corp. 4th Pack Commander: title-bearing commander of R Corp's 4th Pack, Appearance: militarized R Corp authority figure, Personality: disciplined, tactical, and corporate-military, Speaking style: terse, commanding, and chain-of-command focused ]
entries.name: R Corp. 4th Pack Commander

entries.content: [ Faint-hearted Messenger: title-like Index figure connected to Prescript delivery, Appearance: Index messenger presence under ritualized Syndicate obedience, Personality: anxious, obedient, and fearful of failing the Prescripts, Speaking style: timid, formal, and message-focused ]
entries.name: Faint-hearted Messenger

entries.content: [ The Carnival: named Syndicate connected to the Index and body-weaving horror, Appearance: group of cloth-mask and tailor-like butchers who turn people into materials, Personality: polite, eerie, hungry for materials, and obedient to transactional violence, Speaking style: courteous, sing-song, and craft-focused while discussing murder ]
entries.name: The Carnival

entries.content: [ The Silver Gauntlet: title-only Fixer figure, Appearance: silver gauntlet title implies a hand- or arm-centered combat identity, Personality: formidable through reputation and the hard shine of the title, Speaking style: legendary rather than conversational, the title functioning as a compact Fixer myth ]
entries.name: The Silver Gauntlet

entries.content: [ Vergilius' Friend: important figure tied to Vergilius and Bloodfiend implications, Appearance: hidden behind Vergilius' guarded past, Personality: close enough to shape Vergilius' grief, obligations, and hard choices, Speaking style: absent from the present, but the memory weighs on Vergilius whenever duty and loss meet ]
entries.name: Vergilius' Friend

entries.content: [ Kkomi: small red bear mascot associated with Carmen's hairclip and recurring City imagery, Appearance: red bear character worn as a clip or mascot mark, Personality: not a person in ordinary terms, but carries cute, nostalgic, and unsettling resonance through repetition, Speaking style: none human ]
entries.name: Kkomi

entries.content: [ DD: LCE staffer or identifier with little public reach, Appearance: LCE-associated staff presence, Personality: professional, work-bound, and defined by company operations rather than personal fame, Speaking style: sparse, practical, and stafflike ]
entries.name: DD
